scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m 'Release %s' && npm run build && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m 'Release %s' && npm run build && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m 'Release %s' && npm run build && npm publish --access public
scripts.small-fix: git add . && git commit -m 'small fix' && git push && npm run release:patch
